Video.summary: The guys bring the well-known but anemic 305 SBC into the shop by viewer request.
Video.title: Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build

Image.alt: Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build
Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build
Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build

Video.summary: Pat and Frankie finish building up their jazzed up 305 SBC.
Video.title: Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC

Image.alt: Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC
Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC
Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC

Video.summary: We bring our 305 Small Block Chevy back for a second round of racier upgrades.
Video.title: Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue

Image.alt: Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue
Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue
Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue

Video.summary: We take a stock 305 Chevy and a 302 Ford and find out dollar for horsepower who comes out on top.
Video.title: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Image.alt: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Video.summary: 302 vs 305! Round 2 of the classic debate. Budget head swap dyno test. Which 90's head rules?
Video.title: 302 vs. 305 Round 2

Video.summary: 302 SBF vs. 305 SBC battle: We're increasing compression on both, comparing gains head-to-head!
Video.title: 302 vs 305 Pt 3 High Compression Showdown

Video.summary: We shorten Cream Puff's frame, show you our short bed options, and then start the new bed assembly.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Video.summary: We build a trans tunnel and wheel tubs in our 72 Super Cheyenne for a lowered stance.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 5: Tunnel Vision

Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin teardown of our Chevy C-10 and mockup the new suspension for better handling.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.summary: We convert a long bed to short bed and install a rear step notch to drop our C-10
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Video.summary: We clean up our 1972 C-10 front end with relocated hood hinges and a custom bed frame.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 6: Bed Redefined

Video.summary: Behold "Outlaw" VIN #1! Mustang Brothers' supercharged '67 Fastback is a Brittany Blue beast.
Video.title: Mustang Brothers

Video.summary: The Carcass crew found a 2012 Jeep JK at an auction and just had to buy it.
Video.title: Jeep JK Part 1: Suspension Overhaul

Video.summary: The guys put the final touches on the Jeep JK, adding a new bumper and winch.
Video.title: Jeep JK Part 2: Trail Accessories

Video.summary: We crew bring in a road worn 1996 4X4 Tahoe with plans to convert it into the two wheel drive version.
Video.title: Revamped Tahoe Part 1

Video.summary: Our 1996 Chevy Tahoe continues its conversion with exterior improvements and new wheels and tires.
Video.title: Revamped Tahoe Part 2

Video.summary: In the series launch we take a 1991 Chevy Suburban and transform it into ‘Project Unbreakable.’
Video.title: Project Unbreakable

Video.summary: It’s fabrication time on our Chevy Suburban we’re calling “Unbreakable”.
Video.title: Fab Four

Video.summary: Brendon Graeves' 1000hp twin-turbo LS '11 BMW M3: a carbon-bodied drift monster engineered for domination!
Video.title: Hot Shots Drift Car

Video.summary: Is the C5 Corvette Z06 the ultimate bang for your buck track and street car, or is there room for improvement?
Video.title: C5 Z06 Bolt on Power

Video.summary: Adding more Stop and Go to our C5 Corvette Z06 for the track.
Video.title: Adding Stop and Go to a C5 Corvette Z06

Image.alt: Adding Stop and Go to a C5 Corvette Z06
Adding Stop and Go to a C5 Corvette Z06
Adding Stop and Go to a C5 Corvette Z06

Video.summary: Old school sheet metal tricks to convert classic '49 Ford into a custom with suicide doors.
Video.title: Project Banana Split - Deadly Doors

Video.summary: How to convert from manual door handles to electric door poppers and punch custom hood louvers.
Video.title: Punch Job

Video.summary: Hands on tech on how to graft in '55 Olds lamps.
Video.title: Custom Headlights & Tail Lamps

Video.summary: Team fabs custom fiberglass bubble skirts and lays down a two-tone paint job on our old school '49 Ford custom
Video.title: Banana Split: Skirts & Paint

Video.summary: Team transplants hopped up 3-duce flathead into old school custom.
Video.title: Flatheads Rule

Video.summary: Secrets on fabricating a custom interior and how muscle car sheet metal panels are made and tested
Video.title: Hot Rod How-to: Interiors

Video.summary: How to upgrade a Mopar interior.
Video.title: Resto-Mod Interior

Video.summary: We fire up Banana Split and install old school exhaust flame throwers.
Video.title: Fire In The Hole

Video.summary: How to get factory-match paint for your ’69 Dodge Dart. Color mixing tips for Project Bullseye.
Video.title: Project Bullseye – Match Game

Video.summary: Our GMC “Unbreakable” Suburban gets its new suspension.
Video.title: Suburban Suspension

Video.summary: Our “Unbreakable” Suburban gets its engine and transmission.
Video.title: Unbreakable Nears The Finish

Video.summary: We install the engine and trans, make brake lines, then fab a clean, simple exhaust on our 1972 C-10.

Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Video.summary: Installing front and back suspension on a 1969 Dodge Dart, with tips for control, safety, and style.
Video.title: Project Bullseye – Suspension Installation

Video.summary: We're making real progress on Project Bullseye, our '69 Dodge Dart, with suspension, wiring, and paint.

Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash

Video.summary: With its rear axle installed, new tires mounted, and trim blacked out, our 1969 Dart is now on all fours.
Video.title: Finally Looks Like a Dart Again

Image.alt: Finally Looks Like a Dart Again
Finally Looks Like a Dart Again
Finally Looks Like a Dart Again

Video.summary: Project Bullseye gets a power upgrade, brakes, steering, painted scooped hood, and Swinger stripe.

Video.summary: Our 305 Small Block Chevy and 302 Small Block Ford return for another round of the brand loyalty war.
Video.title: Small Block Showdown Round 4

Video.summary: Pat and Mike button up their Gen III Hemi with super trick heads, then it's tech tip time with Mike and Pat.
Video.title: Hemi Top End Magic

Video.summary: In Stage 3 of our small-block build, our 383 becomes a 406.
Video.title: In-House Power Mouse Roars

Video.summary: Neither snow nor rain nor heat nor gloom of night will keep our guys from their special delivery.
Video.title: Mail Jeep

Video.summary: The MuscleCar guys are in search of a '69 Chevy Camaro to transform into a COPO tribute car.
Video.title: COPO Camaro
